Package org.bloomreach.forge.discovery.config

Class ConfigDefaults

java.lang.Object
org.bloomreach.forge.discovery.config.ConfigDefaults
public final class ConfigDefaults extends Object
Coded defaults for structural (non-sensitive) Discovery configuration. Used as fallbacks when a JCR property is absent.

  • Method Details

    • isStaging

      public static boolean isStaging(String environment)

    • resolveBaseUri

      public static String resolveBaseUri(String uri, String environment)
      Resolves the effective base URI for the given environment. Null, or either known default (production or staging), defers to the active environment. A custom (non-default) URI is returned unchanged — enables private API endpoints.

    • resolvePathwaysBaseUri

      public static String resolvePathwaysBaseUri(String uri, String environment)

    • resolveAutosuggestBaseUri

      public static String resolveAutosuggestBaseUri(String uri, String environment)
